ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Continued To May-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeannie Huey in Propria Persona

Ms. Huey stated that she has an appraisal, sent to the referee on Monday, and that she filed something but did not attach the appraisal to it. Ms. Huey also stated that the only asset is her mother's 20% of the house, there are no bank accounts or stocks. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is continued to May 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The 1st Accounting set for May 9, 2018 is also continued to May 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on April 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why theInventory and Appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeannie Huey in Propria Persona.
Warren Wong in Propria Persona.

Ms. Huey stated that they had discussions and that they agreed to her being the administrator. Mr. Wong stated that he is not opposing and that they have talked about how to resolve the matter. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for March 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for May 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Continued To Oct-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeannie Huey (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Warren Wong (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Huey provided a proposed order, stated that the Estate property is located at 2178 21st Avenue, that the property is owned by four people and that she is seeking to probate her Mother's 25% of the property. Ms. Huey also stated that the value of the home is about $1,076,000.00 and that an appraisal was done fifteen to twenty years ago. Mr. Wong stated that it is his understanding that his Mother was the Trustee and deeded the property to three people and 20% to the other siblings, that he is seeking to find out if his Mother owns 25%, that he wants to file something, that he took out a $250,000.00 loan on the property and that his Mother approved it. The Court advised the Parties that this is a complicated matter and that they need to hire attorneys. The Court also advised Mr. Wong that he needs to file a competing petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
